name: Sweet 'n' Sour Pork ( MW )
recipeInstructions:
1. Pork shoulder should be cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Green pepper should be seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Mix pork, onion, pineapple (with juice), brown sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, soy sauce, salt, pepper, and ginger in a 2-quart casserole.
4. Cover and microwave on medium (50%) until pork is no longer pink, stirring every 3 minutes for 24 to 28 minutes.
5. Stir in green pepper and pea pods. Cover and microwave on high (100%) for 3 to 4 minutes until green pepper and pea pods are tender.
